title: salix purpurea helix
intro: Salix purpurea helix, also known as the purple osier or purple willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Salix purpurea helix include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Salix purpurea helix can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
